---
title: "Interactive Data Dashboard"
format: dashboard
---

### Row {height=60%}

```{r}
#| title: Market Trends
library(ggplot2)
ggplot(economics, aes(date, unemploy)) + geom_line(color = "steelblue") + theme_minimal()
```

### Row {height=40%}
```{r}
#| title: Summary Statistics
summary(economics[, c("unemploy", "pop")])
```
